subject: Gastly, a spherical ghost-type Pokemon wreathed in gas
description: A round black orb-like creature with large white eyes and a wide open mouth showing pink interior and small fangs floats at the center of the frame. It is enveloped in a cloud of wispy purple gas that radiates outward with jagged, cloud-like edges. The background is a dark forest at night — silhouetted trees and deep blue sky, with pale low-lying ground mist. The contrast between the black figure and its bright purple gas cloud is sharp. The creature has a mischievous, wide-mouthed expression.
foreground: Gastly centered, surrounded by purple gas cloud
background: dark forest with silhouetted trees, deep blue night sky, ground mist
